FindMySecureEnvironmentXPCService(8) System Manager's Manual FindMySecureEnvironmentXPCService(8)

NAME

FindMySecureEnvironmentXPCService — Find My secure environment XPC service

SYNOPSIS

FindMySecureEnvironmentXPCService

DESCRIPTION

FindMySecureEnvironmentXPCService is an XPC service that provides authenticated access to Apple-internal secure environment endpoints on behalf of Find My clients. It handles AppleConnect OAuth authentication, session token management, and authenticated request forwarding so that client processes do not require direct access to authentication credentials.

The service is launched on demand by launchd(8) when a client connects to its Mach service and idle-exits when no connections remain.

There are no configuration options to FindMySecureEnvironmentXPCService. Users should not run it manually.

Authentication Flow

When a client sends a request, the service:

  1. Obtains an AppleConnect OAuth authorization code via AppleConnectClient.framework.
  2. Exchanges the authorization code for a session token from the secure environment token endpoint.
  3. Caches the session token for subsequent requests.
  4. Injects the session token and environment headers into the client's request and forwards it to the backend.
  5. Returns the response data and HTTP response directly to the client.

If the backend returns HTTP 401, the service invalidates its cached token and AppleConnect ticket, re-authenticates, and retries the request once before returning the error.

XPC Interface

The service exports two methods via the SecureEnvironmentXPCProtocol interface:

fetchSecureEnvironmentToken
Authenticates and returns a session token string. Primarily used for diagnostics via sptool(8).
performAuthenticatedRequest
Accepts an NSURLRequest, injects authentication headers, forwards the request, and replies with the response data and NSURLResponse.

ENTITLEMENTS

Clients must possess the com.apple.findmy.secureenvironment.client entitlement and declare a Mach service lookup for com.apple.findmy.secureenvironment in their entitlements file. Connections without the entitlement are rejected.

MACH SERVICE

com.apple.findmy.secureenvironment

FILES

/System/Library/PrivateFrameworks/FindMySecureEnvironment.framework/XPCServices/FindMySecureEnvironmentXPCService.xpc
Service bundle.
/System/Library/LaunchDaemons/com.apple.findmy.secureenvironment.plist
launchd.plist(5) configuration.

SEE ALSO

launchd(8), searchpartyd(8), searchpartyuseragent(8), sptool(8), launchd.plist(5)

April 14, 2026 Mac OS X
